name: dotmotif
description: DotMotif graph-motif query DSL from aplbrain/dotmotif. Upstream constructs Lark with ALL defaults — so this is a wild Earley + dynamic-lexer entry (like mistql).

inputs.inputs/m01.motif: triple-quoted motif strings from dotmotif test files + README
